context: Muse should detect missing EXTEND.md and run first-time setup, asking 6 questions and creating the config file.

checklist.name: detects-missing-extend
checklist.description: Muse detects that no EXTEND.md exists and triggers the first-time setup flow instead of proceeding with topic discovery

checklist.name: asks-six-questions
checklist.description: Muse asks the user 6 setup questions covering: name, content pillars, audience, writing formats, personal notes paths, and signal DB

checklist.name: creates-extend-md
checklist.description: After receiving answers, Muse creates .aaron-skills/muse/EXTEND.md with valid YAML frontmatter containing the user's responses

checklist.name: confirms-and-proceeds
checklist.description: Muse confirms setup is complete and proceeds to topic discovery
